title: Bangalore Heat Wave
lead: Bangalore is experiencing a severe heat wave with a Z-Score of +4.17. The heat wave has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current weather conditions in Bangalore are extreme, with a relative humidity of 29% and wind speed of 19.9 km/h. 
 The Cooling Degree Days (CDD) is at 13.6 GG, indicating a high energy demand for cooling. 
 The heat wave is expected to continue, with no relief in sight, and the city's infrastructure will be put to the test.
conclusion: Activate emergency response protocols to mitigate the effects of the heat wave.
